title: Unique Party 45824 - 18" Foil Birthday Cheer 40th Birthday Balloon
features: 1 Foil 40th Birthday Balloon from the Birthday Cheer range
Foil Birthday Balloon measures 18" (45cm) when fully inflated with helium (ships uninflated)
Featuring a numerical "40!" and confetti shapes in bold, bright colours, this foil balloon is ideal for any 40th birthday party
Combine with latex balloons in a balloon bouquet, tie to the guest of honour's chair or attach to the top of a large birthday gift
Search for other Birthday Cheer party supplies and coordinating solid colour party decorations from Unique Party
description: Product Description Add a lovely balloon centrepiece to your milestone birthday party with this colourful foil 40th birthday cheer helium balloon! featuring a numerical "40!" and confetti in bold, bright colours on a stylish black background, this eye-catching party balloon is ideal for your 40th birthday party. Tie it indoors to a chair for a quick and easy stand-alone decoration, or outside your house or venue to help guests locate the party. This foil balloon would also look great combined with assorted latex balloons, curling ribbon and a balloon weight as part of a balloon bouquet or table centrepiece. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains 1 x Foil Balloon See more
